exhibits_walked.detail: Full clause walk in RT_depth_contract_burdens.json — all 22 articles walked with operative terms, triggers, durations, money terms, and carve-outs

exhibits_deferred.why_deferred: Non-Traditional Locations represent only 10 of 3,120 franchised restaurants (0.3% of system). Key provisions already extracted from Item 17 table and FDD body text (modified territory rights, term limitations, opening conditions, termination triggers for Other FA).
already_recovered: Term modification (lesser of 10 years or facility contract)
Must open simultaneously with Other Restaurant
exhibits_deferred.remaining_missing: Specific clause-by-clause modifications to standard FA provisions for Non-Traditional operations

exhibits_deferred.why_deferred: All incentive terms fully described in Item 6 notes (pages 32-35) with complete rate schedules, eligibility requirements, and conditions. Addendum form implements these disclosed terms.

Only 1 Multi-Brand Location in the entire system. Key provisions extracted from FDD body text (Items 1, 5, 6, 8, 11, 12) covering separate POS, separate employees, opening conditions, transfer simultaneity, and termination triggers.
already_recovered: Must open simultaneously with Other Restaurant
Transfer may require simultaneous transfer of Other Restaurant rights
Termination if Other FA terminates or Other Restaurant abandoned

exhibits_deferred.why_deferred: Key DA terms adequately extracted from Items 12 and 17 (territory rights, Development Schedule, Target Area protection, termination triggers, transfer restrictions, noncompete). DA is a standard development vehicle; its operative substance is disclosed in the FDD body.
already_recovered: Development Area definition and Target Area protection
exhibits_deferred.remaining_missing: Specific DA sections on controlled affiliate requirements, detailed target area expiration mechanics

exhibits_deferred.why_deferred: Standard general release form required at renewal and transfer. Key fact: release is required per FA Sections 5.02(f), 14.02(vii), 14.04. MD addendum exempts MD Franchise Law claims from release. Form itself is standard.
already_recovered: MD exemption for state franchise law claims
exhibits_deferred.remaining_missing: Specific release language and scope (breadth of released claims, specific carve-outs)
